profumo-paper.description: Reproduce arXiv:2506.19062 end-to-end (relic + DD + ID + one-loop).

dm-relic.description: DM relic density (Omega h^2): MadDM primary, micrOMEGAs validator.

dm-indirect.description: DM indirect-detection (gamma-ray, nu, e+) - MadDM driver.

bsm-model-building.description: BSM Lagrangian -> spectrum + decays. SARAH primary; FeynRules optional.
